# Siemens iX Registry

> Root LLM entrypoint for all deployed Siemens iX registries. Use this file to choose a registry version, then open that version's own llms.txt for focused component and block context.

Check the version of "iX" you are using in your project and select the corresponding registry version below for the most compatible LLM context e.g if @siemens/ix-react version 5.0.0 is installed, the 5.0.0 registry version will likely have the most relevant and accurate LLM context.

Latest registry tag: 5.0.0.

## Registry versions

- [v5.0.0](v5.0.0/llms.txt): Versioned Siemens iX registry LLM entrypoint.
- [feat/block-cli](feat/block-cli/llms.txt): Versioned Siemens iX registry LLM entrypoint.

## Component docs

- [v5.0.0 components](v5.0.0/llms/components.md): Component API, examples, Figma IDs, and relationship availability for v5.0.0.
- [feat/block-cli components](feat/block-cli/llms/components.md): Component API, examples, Figma IDs, and relationship availability for feat/block-cli.

## Block docs

- [v5.0.0 blocks](v5.0.0/llms/blocks.md): Registry block metadata, variants, files, dependencies, and component usage availability for v5.0.0.
- [feat/block-cli blocks](feat/block-cli/llms/blocks.md): Registry block metadata, variants, files, dependencies, and component usage availability for feat/block-cli.

## Optional

- [Registry manifest](registry.json): Machine-readable manifest containing all deployed registry versions and dist-tags.
